title: [WAVE RIDE] OVER DRIVE 16+17 Custom Version
description:
Source: http://www.over-drive-cg.jp  
  
Warning: Does contain some loli.  
  
This is the doujinshi group WAVE RIDE's 16th and 17th CG set in rared format, featuring hentai images of Azuza, Yui and Mio from K-On!, Canal Vorfeed from Lost Universe (a personal favorite), Azmaria from Chrono Crusade, Haruhi, the girls from Night Wizard, Tokyo Mew Mew and Fushigiboshi no Futago Hime, plus many more!  
  
I've custom tailored this set, which contains the 2nd highest resolution images in PNG format that were available on the DVD, along with RGB versions of the huggable pillow data. The original DVD is over 4.4GBs.  
  
All the images are still there without redundancy and bloated unnecessary sizes.

![Image](http://s3.directupload.net/images/110113/zua6yw5v.jpg)  
![Image](http://s1.directupload.net/images/110113/br5ahujk.png)  
**Tomohisa and Endo aren’t either so handsome or ugly; they are just normal boy students. They’re looking at Mizuho, the senior student, and Mikura, their classmate. Mizuho is a returnee student, and she attracts all the students by her beauty. Mizuho notices their eyes, and she gives Tomohisa a suggestive look.  
  
One day, Tomohisa finds a note in his desk. It says, “I’m waiting in the ladies’ room on the third floor”. He goes there and finds Mizuho is waiting for him...  
  
The next day, Tomohisa can’t help recalling the event the day before. He happens to find that Endo is gone, and also Mikura , whom he loves secretly, is missing, too. He’s afraid that they’re doing things. However, exactly, they’re doing things on the fire escape**
